heading: Municipal leases
label: 929 Municipal leases
text: A lease to a municipality shall not be treated as an executory contract or unexpired lease for the purposes of section 365 or 502(b)(6) of this title solely by reason of its being subject to termination in the event the debtor fails to appropriate rent.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , but not applicable to any case commenced under this title before that date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under .Nov. 3, 1988section 12 of Pub. L. 100–597section 101 of this title
